title: Jd Buss
compiled_truth: Jd Buss is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-17 to 2002-03-15), Jd Buss sent 20 and received 64 emails, totalling 84 interactions. Top correspondents: [Gary Bryan](people/gary-bryan) (9), [A  Martin](people/a-martin) (8), [J  Farmer](people/j-farmer) (7), [Brian Redmond](people/brian-redmond) (6), [David Baumbach](people/david-baumbach) (4). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, calendar, deleted_items, inbox, pipelines, term_proposals.
